title: Journalism Science Alliance hosts pre-conference at the European Communication Conference 2026
content:
The Journalism Science Alliance, in partnership with the FRONTIERS project, is hosting a pre-conference at the European Communication Conference 2026, on September 7, in Brno, Czech Republic. 

The session, entitled “Journalists-scientists relationship: existing models, present and future”, will bring together grantees and collaborators from both the Journalism Science Alliance and FRONTIERS, two European initiatives, for a round table discussion. Starting from the experience of panel members, the audience will be invited to share their own perspective on how the relationship between journalists and scientists is evolving, and where it’s headed.

Participation is free of charge, but registration is required. Register here until 30 June 2026. Spots are limited.

You can find more information
